conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction.
org_constraint: The email must include the phrase "customer support" at least once.
new_constraint: The keyword "support" must not appear in the response.
instruction: Draft an email to a bank asking for clarification about a recent transaction. The email must include the phrase "customer support" at least once. The keyword "support" must not appear in the response.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Recent Transaction - Account [Your Account Number]

Dear [Bank Name] Customer Service Team,

I am writing to request clarification regarding a recent transaction on my account, [Your Account Number].

On [Date of Transaction], a transaction of [Amount] was posted to my account. The description for this transaction is listed as "[Transaction Description as it appears on your statement]". I do not immediately recognize this charge and would appreciate it if you could provide more details about what this transaction pertains to.

Could you please investigate this for me and let me know the nature of this debit?

If you require any further information from my end to assist with this inquiry, please do not hesitate to let me know. I look forward to your prompt response from customer support.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Full Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
